title: Data Center Construction Moratorium
key_provision: 3-year halt on all data center construction; DEC and PSC to adopt impact rules
sponsor: Sen. Liz Krueger (D), Asm. Anna Kelles (D)

title: Data Center Moratorium
key_provision: Moratorium on >100MW data centers until Nov 2029; PUC study of water/rates/property

title: Data Center Consumer Ratepayer Protection Act
key_provision: Data centers pay proportional infrastructure costs; prevent cost pass-through to ratepayers

title: Data Center Tax Incentive Sunset
key_provision: End tax incentives for data centers not operating by Jan 1 2027

title: Data Center Site Application Moratorium
key_provision: Halt all new data center site applications until July 2028 or fulfillment of pending interconnection

title: Data Center Tax Incentive Reduction
key_provision: Reduce tax incentives to replacement equipment and repairs only

title: Emission-Free Backup Generator Requirement
key_provision: Require emission-free backup generators for tax incentive eligibility

title: Eliminate Corporate Tax Credits
key_provision: Eliminate all corporate tax credits (including data center) to fund income tax reduction

title: Data Center Construction Moratorium
key_provision: Freeze data center construction until July 2030; PUC investigation of environmental/economic impacts

title: Emergency Data Center Moratorium
key_provision: Prevent new data center construction until co-location legislation passes; require co-located power generation

title: Hyperscale Data Center Moratorium
key_provision: 1-year moratorium on expansion or new hyperscale data center construction

title: Large Load Customer Conditions
key_provision: PSC to condition permits on infrastructure cost coverage; require statewide ratepayer benefit demonstration

title: Grid Connection Cost Protections
key_provision: PUC rules ensuring grid connection costs not shifted to other retail customers

title: Generating Arkansas Jobs Act of 2025
key_provision: PSC bypass via iterative resubmission; strategic investment rider; auto-approval default

title: Data Center Tax Exemption Amendment
key_provision: $100M threshold; $2B Qualified Large Data Center across nonadjacent sites; fiber tax-exempt

title: Off-Grid Electricity Provider
key_provision: Off-grid providers not public utilities; exempt from PUC oversight; lose exemption on grid connection

title: Local Moratorium Preemption
key_provision: Clarifies and restricts local government authority to impose development moratoriums
